APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/10/22 IS VACATED AND THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS 3/21/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL DISCOVERY WILL TRACK THE ORIGINAL TRIAL DATE OF 1/10/22. IF A PARTY NEEDS TO RE-OPEN DISCOVERY, THEN IT WILL BE DONE IN THE LAW AND MOTION DEPARTMENT.
